# Plugins Pre-configured

This vault has `.obsidian/community-plugins.json` already set with the professional stack:

- Dataview (queries, tables, tasks)
- Tasks (proper task management)
- Templater (advanced templates)
- Style Settings + Minimal theme (clean pro look)

When you open the vault, Obsidian should prompt you to install these. Enable them after install.

Everything else (hotkeys, appearance, workspace opening to Index) is already configured for pro game dev workflow.
